aesthetic: Noir & Gold — Didone italic luxury, cinematic black, one drop of red per page
principles: Deep red #DA291C appears once per page — surgical sparseness
Whitespace ≥55% — luxury means space to waste
Fraunces italic display: Didone elegance, high stroke contrast
Titles ≤4 words — luxury copy law: less is more expensive
Zero box-shadows — depth via chiaroscuro surface contrast
promptGuide: Apply the Noir & Gold aesthetic: Fraunces italic weight 400 display (letter-spacing +0.04em, luxury type-setting standard), Plus Jakarta Sans weight 300 body (extreme contrast with display), bg #0c0c0c (matte black velvet), text #f0ece4 (warm cream), Deep red #DA291C on ONE element per page only, Racing Yellow #FFF200 max 2× per deck, 2px border-radius (precision engineering), zero box-shadows (depth via chiaroscuro), titles ≤4 words, third-person or subjectless sentences, no exclamations/emoji/casual language.
